allow: PowerShell($root = "c:/Users/daniele.de.cinque/Documents/agentic-iam"; "=== files ==="; if \(Test-Path "$root/files"\) { Get-ChildItem "$root/files" -Force | Select-Object Name } else { "files folder absent" }; "=== public ==="; Get-ChildItem "$root/public" -Force | Select-Object Name, Length; "=== logs ==="; Get-ChildItem "$root/logs" -Force | Select-Object Name, Length; "=== mock-data ==="; Get-ChildItem "$root/mock-data" -Force | Select-Object Name, Length)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:/Users/daniele.de.cinque/Documents/agentic-iam/docs/" -Force | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object Name, @{Name='Lines';Expression={if \(-not $_.PSIsContainer\) { \(Get-Content $_.FullName | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines } else { '-' }}}, @{Name='KB';Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($root = "c:/Users/daniele.de.cinque/Documents/agentic-iam"; @\('mock-data/users.json','config/app_catalog.json','config/process_governance.json','config/risk_matrix.json','config/sod_rules.json'\) | ForEach-Object { try { Get-Content "$root/$_" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; "OK  $_" } catch { "FAIL $_ : $_.Exception.Message" } })

PowerShell($root = "c:/Users/daniele.de.cinque/Documents/agentic-iam"; @\('mock-data/users.json','config/app_catalog.json','config/process_governance.json','config/risk_matrix.json','config/sod_rules.json'\) | ForEach-Object { try { Get-Content "$root/$_" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; "OK  $_" } catch { "FAIL $_ : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; "---"; "Syntax check JS:"; @\('agents/conversational.js','agents/planner.js','agents/orchestrator.js','server.js','tools/email_generator.js'\) | ForEach-Object { $r = & node --check "$root/$_" 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "OK  $_" } else { "FAIL $_ : $r" } })
